parameters.query: SELECT id, opp_title as title, agency, dept as department, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value, response_deadline, source_url, place_of_performance, solicitation_number, 'Local' as source FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE opp_title ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR agency ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR dept ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR naics_code ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR solicitation_number ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR place_of_performance ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({api_key: $env.TAVILY_API_KEY, query: ($json.body?.query || $json.body?.q || '') + ' federal contract opportunities government contracting', max_results: 8, search_depth: 'basic'}) }}
